title: Conditional use of the waiting indicator in skills
context: Skills were unconditionally outputting the waiting indicator 'ESPERANDO RESPUESTA DEL USUARIO...', even on informational success handoffs.
content: Skills must end with the waiting indicator only when asking for input or stopping before a pending human decision (e.g., block state, human merge). Informational success handoffs must omit the waiting indicator to cleanly end the turn.
